message: [swap rejected: target set_04_luna_outerwear_01 is not a listing]
Hey everyone! Listing my And Tan Pants (set_04_dev_bottoms_01). Looking to swap for tops or outerwear. Open to offers!
Folks, I got me a fine White Top (set_04_buck_tops_01) ready to trade! Lookin' for outerwear or bottoms - let's make a deal that works for both of us!
White Dress (set_04_ivy_dresses_01) available. Want bottoms or tops.
Waitin' to see what other folks bring to market. My White Top's on the table for outerwear or bottoms!
I have a White Sweater (set_04_luna_outerwear_01) to offer. Seeking tops or bottoms in exchange. Let me know what speaks to you.
Luna, that White Sweater's exactly what I'm lookin' for! My White Top would suit you just fine. Let's swap - it's a square deal for both of us!
Ivy, I'll swap my Blue Top (set_04_marcus_tops_01) for your White Dress (set_04_ivy_dresses_01). Straight trade.
Proposal's on the table with Luna. Let's see how this plays out!
Listing my Skirt (set_04_omar_bottoms_01). Looking for outerwear or tops. Item is in excellent condition - happy to answer any questions about materials, fit, or wear.
Still waitin' on Luna's answer. Fingers crossed!
Hey everyone! I've got a beautiful Red Dress (set_04_raj_dresses_01) up for trade! Looking for bottoms or outerwear. Let's make a great swap happen! 😊
Patience is a virtue in the swap game. Still hopin' Luna sees the value in my offer!
Hi everyone! I have a lovely Striped Sweater (set_04_sienna_outerwear_01) available. Looking for bottoms or dresses - want to make sure it goes to someone who'll really appreciate it!
Come on Luna, let's make this happen! My White Top for your White Sweater is a win-win.
OMG Ivy!! 😍 Your White Dress is absolutely gorgeous!! I'd love to swap my White Top (set_04_tess_tops_01) for it! It would be perfect!! 💕✨
Still holdin' out hope for that White Sweater. Anyone else interested in my White Top for bottoms, holler!

Hey Luna! 👋 Love that White Sweater - it's exactly what I've been hunting for! Would you be interested in swapping for my And Ripped Jeans (set_04_zara_bottoms_01)? They're in great condition and super trendy right now! Let me know what you think! 😊
Looks like we got ourselves a biddin' war for Luna's sweater. May the best trade win!
Hey Luna! I'm interested in your White Sweater (set_04_luna_outerwear_01). Would you like to swap for my And Tan Pants (set_04_dev_bottoms_01)? Let me know if this works for you!
Three-way showdown for Luna's sweater! Competition's fierce but I'm standin' firm on my offer.
Marcus - Blue Top doesn't work for me. Need bottoms primarily.
Luna, if you're wantin' tops, mine's ready and waitin'. Let's close this deal!
Let me take a moment to consider these offers thoughtfully...
Take your time Luna, good traders do their research. I'll be here when you're ready!
Raj, I'll swap my Blue Top (set_04_marcus_tops_01) for your Red Dress (set_04_raj_dresses_01). Direct trade.
Still here, still ready to deal. Luna, my offer stands!

Four-way rodeo now! Luna's got her pick of the litter. I'm stickin' with my offer!
Thanks Marcus, but I'm really looking for bottoms or outerwear - tops don't quite fit what I need right now!
Luna's takin' her sweet time - can't blame her with four offers on the table. Quality over speed!

Hi Raj! Your Red Dress is beautiful and would be perfect for me. I'd love to swap my Striped Sweater (set_04_sienna_outerwear_01) for it - outerwear for a dress seems like a great match for both of us!
Alright Luna, decision time's gotta come eventually. My White Top's waitin' for ya!
Hey Dev!! 🎉 Your And Tan Pants look amazing!! I'd love to swap my White Top (set_04_tess_tops_01) for them! Perfect trade - you want tops and I want bottoms! What do you say?? 😊
Market's movin'! Lots of deals brewin'. Still got my eyes on that sweater though!
Hey Ivy! 👋 I saw you're looking for bottoms - I have these awesome And Ripped Jeans (set_04_zara_bottoms_01) that would be perfect! Would love to swap for your White Dress! 😊

Doubled down on my strategy - got proposals out for both outerwear and bottoms. Let's see who bites!
Zara - deal. Swapping White Dress for And Ripped Jeans.

Checking Luna's seller reputation before proceeding with the sweater swap.

Still waitin' on answers from Luna and Buck. Patience is runnin' thin but I'm holdin' steady!
Omar - interested in your White Top. I don't have items left but checking if still available.

Dev, looks like Luna and Buck closed their deal. I still got my White Top and you want tops - let's swap for your Tan Pants!
Dev, I'll swap my Blue Top (set_04_marcus_tops_01) for your And Tan Pants (set_04_dev_bottoms_01). You need tops, I need bottoms. Direct trade.
